title: KwaNonqaba Police welcome 2026, thank community
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS - Lieutenant Colonel Virgie Julius, the KwaNonqaba Police Station’s commander, writes:","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - Lieutenant Colonel Virgie Julius, the KwaNonqaba Police Station’s commander, writes: "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As we usher in the new year, I would like to extend warm greetings to all members of our community.","html":"As we usher in the new year, I would like to extend warm greetings to all members of our community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The beginning of a new year offers us an opportunity to reflect on the past year and to renew our collective commitment to building safer, stronger and more resilient communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On behalf of the KwaNonqaba SAPS management, I thank you for your cooperation, support and partnerships throughout the year that has passed.","html":"On behalf of the KwaNonqaba SAPS management, I thank you for your cooperation, support and partnerships throughout the year that has passed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As you celebrated with family and friends, I believed everyone did so responsibly; you obeyed the law and avoided reckless behaviour.","html":"As you celebrated with family and friends, I believed everyone did so responsibly; you obeyed the law and avoided reckless behaviour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This was reflected in our crime stats that showed a downward trajectory in contact and violent crimes in the months leading up to the festive season. We thank you all for this.","html":"This was reflected in our crime stats that showed a downward trajectory in contact and violent crimes in the months leading up to the festive season. We thank you all for this."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We trust that we shall continue to fight crime together in 2026 and strengthen our relationships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please remember that the safety of others is just as important as your own.","html":"Please remember that the safety of others is just as important as your own."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us all say no to drinking and driving, acts of violence and any conduct that places lives at risk.","html":"Let us all say no to drinking and driving, acts of violence and any conduct that places lives at risk."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the little ones start their schooling careers, let me take a moment and spare a thought for the Grade 12 learners of 2025, who are awaiting their matric results.","html":"As the little ones start their schooling careers, let me take a moment and spare a thought for the Grade 12 learners of 2025, who are awaiting their matric results."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a very stressful time for many young people, and we urge families to be supportive of our youth.","html":"This is a very stressful time for many young people, and we urge families to be supportive of our youth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our police station has capable and competent personnel to assist with giving guidance and referring any person who faces depression and stress in these times for mental health support.","html":"Our police station has capable and competent personnel to assist with giving guidance and referring any person who faces depression and stress in these times for mental health support."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police remain fully operational and committed to protecting life and property."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We will continue to act decisively against criminality while working hand in hand with our CPF, community structures, faith-based organisations and all stakeholders who share the vision of a peaceful society.","html":"We will continue to act decisively against criminality while working hand in hand with our CPF, community structures, faith-based organisations and all stakeholders who share the vision of a peaceful society."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"May the new year bring hope, unity and renewed determination to work together against crime. Let us move forward with respect for the law and care for one another.","html":"May the new year bring hope, unity and renewed determination to work together against crime. Let us move forward with respect for the law and care for one another."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I wish you and your loved ones a safe, prosperous and peaceful new year.","html":"I wish you and your loved ones a safe, prosperous and peaceful new year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
